name: HMS Scorcher (P 258)
events: The history of HMS Scorcher as compiled on this page is extracted from the logbooks of this submarine.
This page was last updated in September 2013.
14 Mar 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) departed her builers yard at Liverpool for Holy Loch. (1)
15 Mar 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) arrived at Holy Loch to begin a period of trials and training. (1)

28 Mar 1945 HMS Trespasser (Lt. L.E. Herrick, DSC, RN), HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR), HMS Votary (Lt. P.M. Staveley, RN) all conducted exercises in the Clyde area with HMS Bridgewater (Cdr.(Retd.) R.H. Mack, RN) and HMS Sardonyx (Lt.Cdr. L.F.L. Hill, RNR). (2)

30 Mar 1945 HMS Trespasser (Lt. L.E. Herrick, DSC, RN), HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR), HMS Votary (Lt. P.M. Staveley, RN) all conducted exercises in the Clyde area with HMS Hastings (A/Cdr. E.A. Stocker, DSC, RN), HMS Shikari (Lt. E.A. Tyrer DSC, RN) and HMS Sardonyx (Lt.Cdr. L.F.L. Hill, RNR). (2)
6 Apr 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) departed Rothesay for Scapa Flow. She was escorted by HMS Shikari (Lt. E.A. Tyrer, DSC, RN). (3)
7 Apr 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) arrived at Scapa Flow where she was to participate in A/S exercises. (3)
9 Apr 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) conducted A/S exercises off Scapa Flow with HMCS Huron (Lt.Cdr. H.V.W. Groos, RCN) and HMS Zodiac (Lt.Cdr. H.R. Rycroft, DSC, RN). (3)
10 Apr 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) conducted A/S exercises off Scapa Flow with ORP Garland (Lt. K. Hess). (3)
11 Apr 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) conducted A/S exercises off Scapa Flow with HMS Obedient (Lt.Cdr. H. Kirkwood, DSC and Bar, RN). (3)
12 Apr 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) conducted A/S exercises off Scapa Flow with ORP Garland (Lt. K. Hess). (3)
14 Apr 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) conducted A/S exercises off Scapa Flow with HMS Savage and HMS Obdurate (Lt.Cdr. R.D. Franks, DSO, DSC, OBE, RN). (3)
16 Apr 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) conducted A/S exercises off Scapa Flow with HMS Savage (Lt.Cdr. C.W. Malins, DSO, DSC and Bar, RN) and HMS Zambesi (Lt.Cdr. J.M. Palmer, RN). (3)

18 Apr 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) conducted A/S exercises off Scapa Flow with HMS Carysfort (Lt.Cdr. L. St.G. Rich, DSO and Bar, RN) and HMS Obdurate (Lt.Cdr. R.D. Franks, DSO, DSC, OBE, RN). (3)
18 Apr 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) conducted A/S exercises off Scapa Flow with HMS Bermuda (Capt. J.S. Bethell, CBE, RN) and ORP Garland (Lt. K. Hess). (3)

22 Apr 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) departed Scapa Flow for Holy Loch. She made the passage together with HMS Tapir (Lt. J.C.Y. Roxbourgh, DSO, DSC, RN), HMS Totem (A/Lt.Cdr. M.B. St. John, RN). They were escorted by HMS Hastings (A/Cdr. E.A. Stocker, DSC, RN). (3)
24 Apr 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) arrived at Holy Loch. (3)
25 Apr 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) was docked at Holy Loch. (3)
26 Apr 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) was undocked. (3)

9 May 1945 HMS Universal (Lt. A.J.D'A. Burdett, RN), HMS Votary (Lt. P.M. Staveley, RN), HMS Virulent (Lt. F.E. Ashmead-Bartlett, RN), HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) and HMS Satyr (Lt. T.S. Weston, DSO, DSC, RN) shifted from Loch Alsh to Tobermory. They were escorted by HMS Biggal (Lt. J.B. Powell, RNR). (4)
27 Jun 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) departed Holy Loch for Gibraltar. (5)
1 Jul 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) arrived at Gibraltar. (5)
3 Jul 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) departed Gibraltar for Malta. (5)
7 Jul 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) arrived at Malta. (5)
13 Jul 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) departed Malta for Port Said. (5)
18 Jul 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) arrived at Port Said. (5)
24 Jul 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) departed Port Said for Aden. (5)
29 Jul 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) arrived at Aden. (5)
30 Jul 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) departed Aden for Trincomalee. (5)
8 Aug 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) arrived at Trincomalee. (5)
28 Aug 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) departed Trincomalee to perform a weather reporting patrol the the North-West of Sumatra. (6)

31 Aug 1945 At 1200 FG/31, in position 05°45'N, 93°05'E, HMS Trident (Lt. A.R. Profit, DSC, RN) sighted HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) which was to take over the weather reporting duties from HMS Trident which at 1240 FG/31 left patrol to return to Trincomalee. (7)
18 Sep 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) arrived back at Trincomalee. (6)
4 Oct 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) departed Trincomalee to return to the U.K. The first leg of the trip was to Aden. (5)
14 Oct 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) arrived at Aden. (5)
15 Oct 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) departed Aden for Port Said. (5)
20 Oct 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) arrived at Port Said. (5)
25 Oct 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) departed Port Said for Malta. (5)
30 Oct 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) arrived at Malta. (5)
1 Nov 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) departed Malta for Gibraltar. (5)
5 Nov 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) arrived at Gibraltar. (5)
6 Nov 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) departed Gibraltar for Rothesay. (5)
11 Nov 1945 HMS Scorcher (Lt. K.S. Renshaw, DSC, RNR) arrived at Rothesay. (5)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
